name: contentforge
description: Open-source enterprise content production pipeline — 19 skills, 13 specialist agents, 11 quality gates, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, fact-checker subagent, three-category internal linking, real .docx output with embedded SEO + Quality + Production + Internal-Link appendices. EU AI Act Article 50 ready via --c2pa-sign on scripts/generate-docx.py. 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. v3.13.0 (2026-05-27): native OpenAI Codex manifest with real published schema (replaces the invented schema correctly removed in v3.12.11). Same skills/ directory shared with .claude-plugin/ and gemini-extension.json (Agent Skills open standard).

interface.shortDescription: Enterprise content production pipeline — title curation, research, brief, draft, 29-pattern humanizer, fact-checker, SEO/AEO/GEO optimizer, .docx export with C2PA signing.
interface.longDescription: ContentForge brings a canonical 11-phase content production pipeline to OpenAI Codex via 19 portable Agent Skills. Run the full pipeline (title curation → research → brief → draft → humanizer 29-pattern AI-detection sweep → fact-checker → SEO/AEO/GEO optimizer → reviewer scorecard → .docx export with C2PA provenance → social adaptation) or pick individual phases. Skills are platform-portable (same SKILL.md format used by Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot CLI). 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors (Slack, Notion, Canva, Webflow, Gmail, Google Calendar, Figma, etc.) connect only when env vars are configured — zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs. Python scripts (humanizer, fact-checker, generate-docx with --c2pa-sign for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance) run when Python 3.8+ is available.
defaultPrompt: Run the ContentForge 11-phase pipeline for an article on EU AI Act compliance.
Humanize this draft against the 29-pattern AI-detection catalog.
Fact-check the claims in this draft against authoritative sources.
Generate a .docx of this article with C2PA provenance for EU distribution.
